nasb.text: So the man became exceedingly prosperous, and had large flocks and female and male servants and camels and donkeys.

esv.text: Thus the man increased greatly and had large flocks, female servants and male servants, and camels and donkeys.

cnv.text: 於是，雅各變得非常富有，擁有很多羊群、僕婢、駱駝和驢。

ccb.text: 因此，雅各变得极其富有，拥有很多羊、骆驼、驴和仆婢。

csbs.text: 于是雅各变得极其昌盛，拥有许多羊群、婢女、男仆、骆驼和驴子。
